name: Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans
description_short: Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 3.7/5 with 82 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 3.7/5.0 Google rating from 82 reviews, Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans has an solid reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Sutton Funding - Merchant Cash Advance - Small Business Loans should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
